body.title: [sprint] Create a first-class intentions store (devlab/runtime/memory/intentions/)
body.intention: I intend that intentions are first-class, grep-able living entities in their own store, so every new intention can be situated against the existing set instead of being buried inside decisions and architecture notes.
body.description:
**Problem:** Akien has asked repeatedly for an intentions folder. There is none. Intentions currently live embedded in decisions/ and architecture/ intention-points, so 'the extant intention list' that /sorted (T-sorted-intention-open-then-map) must map against is only a fragile grep, not a real store. Intentions are meant to be living entities that compete/merge/decompose (project_intentions_as_living_entities).

**Proposed shape:** Add devlab/runtime/memory/intentions/ as a canonical store category. Extend memory_emit.py to accept --category intentions --kind intention. Define an intention envelope: id I-<kebab-slug>, statement ('I intend that...'), status (active/superseded/merged/decomposed), related[], supersedes[], spawned (decisions/tickets it drives). Surface in context-load (a terse 'active intentions' line) and make it the source /sorted maps against.

**Affected files:** devlab/claudecode/memory_emit.py (category allowlist + filename convention), devlab/runtime/memory/intentions/ (new dir + .gitkeep), skills/context-load/run (surface active intentions), optionally a thin unseen_university/intention_store.py reader.
**Design rules:** canonical memory home is devlab/runtime/memory/ (CLAUDE.md Structural rules); JSON flat-file only; NO SQLITE; memory_emit.py is the one write chokepoint.
**Scope boundary:** create the store + emit support + context-load surfacing + one seed intention. Do NOT migrate existing embedded intentions here (that is T-extract-intentions-from-chatlogs). Do not change decision/ticket schemas.
**Completion criteria:** `memory_emit.py --category intentions --kind intention --namespace I-test ...` writes a schema-valid file under intentions/; grep finds it; context-load prints an active-intentions line; the intention envelope is documented. Prove via the emit+grep round-trip test.
**Test plan:** unit/integration: emit a test intention, assert file lands in intentions/ with correct envelope keys, assert reader lists it. Red form available (assert file absent before, present+valid after).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

## PARTIAL DONE (2026-07-01, out-of-sprint, at Akien's direction):
- `intentions` registered in memory_emit CATEGORIES (devlab/claudecode/memory_emit.py).
- Store dir created: devlab/runtime/memory/intentions/ .
- FIRST intention filed through the chokepoint: I-compiled-inference-residue (the compiled-inference/'hand-it-back-clean' thesis; live version of docs/compiled-inference-the-residue.md).
REMAINING for this ticket: intention envelope SCHEMA + validation, context-load active-intentions surfacing line, /sorted intention-mapping, and the guard 'no NEW I-intend-that embedded in decisions/architecture'. Backfill stays in T-extract-intentions-from-chatlogs.
